Windows users, this one’s for you.

Computer use now works on Windows, so Codex can take action on your Windows computer.

And with Windows support for Codex in the ChatGPT mobile app, you can start, review, and steer tasks on the go while work continues on your Windows machine.

An early experience, but we’re working on more ways to keep your work moving, wherever you are.

articles.title:
We’re taking steps to accelerate defensive progress in biology:

- Launching Rosalind Biodefense to help trusted builders develop new biodefense and pandemic preparedness capabilities. 
- Expanding trusted access to GPT-Rosalind for select U.S. government and allied partners supporting public health and biodefense missions. 
Advances in biology can strengthen our ability to prevent, detect, and respond to biological threats.   Our goal is to help build a more robust ecosystem – giving trusted defenders frontier AI to develop and operate new defenses for public health and biodefense. 

https://openai.com/index/strengthening-societal-resilience-with-rosalind-biodefense/

Ah oui impressionnant. Dans ce livre de 2018, l'auteur interroge ces célébrités reconnues sur leur prédiction concernant l'avènement d'une IA de niveau humain. La réponse médiane obtenue : 2099.
(La réponse la plus "optimiste" étant alors celle de Ray Kurzweil,à savoir 2029)
